evals.prompt: 幫我為這個文件產生 permalink: test-files/使用宅配通出貨.md
evals.expected_output: The file test-files/使用宅配通出貨.md gets a permalink field: https://help.cyberbiz.io/ec/orders/使用宅配通出貨
expectations: The permalink field is added to the frontmatter
The permalink value follows the pattern https://help.cyberbiz.io/ec/orders/使用宅配通出貨
The original file content outside frontmatter is preserved unchanged
The title field in frontmatter is not modified

evals.prompt: 請幫我檢查並更新這個文件的 permalink，它目前的值可能不正確: test-files/第三方支付訂單人工退款.md
evals.expected_output: The user is informed about the existing permalink (manual-refund-for-third-party-payments) vs the generated value, and asked for confirmation before overwriting
files: test-files/第三方支付訂單人工退款.md
expectations: The user is asked for confirmation before overwriting the existing permalink
The existing permalink value (manual-refund-for-third-party-payments) is shown to the user
The generated permalink value is shown to the user for comparison

evals.prompt: 幫我批次更新 test-files 目錄下所有缺少 permalink 的 .md 檔案，把它們的 permalink 補上。不需要處理已經有值的檔案。
evals.expected_output: Multiple files in test-files/ get their empty permalink fields filled with the correct generated values, and a summary report is provided
files: test-files/第三方支付訂單人工退款.md
expectations: Files with empty permalink ('permalink: ""') are updated with the generated value
Files with a non-empty existing permalink value are skipped or flagged for review
Each updated file gets a correct value matching the pattern https://help.cyberbiz.io/ec/orders/{{title}}
A summary report is provided showing which files were updated and which were skipped
